top_signals.title: Monaco bomb suspect is a woman from Ukraine
top_signals.summary: Prosecutors issue international arrest warrant for woman believed to have fled to Germany
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran exploring oil sales to Japan, with buyers seeking longer sanctions waiver
top_signals.summary: Three Japanese buyers were looking at possible crude oil purchases from Iran, ​their first since 2019, said two Iranian sources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
top_signals.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Claude Fable relaunch disappoints users with nerfed performance
top_signals.summary: Claude Fable, the company's most powerful model, is now available to all users, but early impressions are disappointing, as it appears to be nowhere near the original release. [...]

top_signals.title: Arendt Investor Services Enters a New Phase of Development With BlackFin as Majority Shareholder
top_signals.summary: Arendt Investor Services (AIS) announces today the completion of its acquisition by BlackFin Capital Partners, following regulatory approval by the CSSF. This transaction marks the start of a new phase of development for AIS, with a clear ambition to accelerate its growth through international expansion and selective acquisitions, while further investing in technology, including AI, [...]
